name: PickerDialog
summary:
通过 Application 对象的 PickerDialog 属性获取 PickerDialog 对象。

下面的代码设置选取器对话框的属性，然后显示选取器对话框。

示例代码
// Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
function test()
{
   	let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
	objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
	objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
	let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
	let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
	let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
	let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
 
	// Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
	let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
}
description: 提供用于选择人员或选择数据的对话框用户界面功能。

properties.name: Application
properties.description: 获取一个 Application 对象，该对象代表 PickerDialog 对象的容器应用程序。只读

properties.name: Creator
properties.description: 获取一个 32 位整数，该整数指示在其中创建了 PickerDialog 对象的应用程序。只读

properties.name: DataHandlerId
properties.summary: 必须先指定 DataHandlerID，之后才能调用选取器对话框。
properties.description: 设置或获取选取器对话框数据处理程序组件的 GUID。可读/写
properties.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码设置选取器对话框的属性，然后显示选取器对话框。
function test()
{
   // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
   let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
   objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
   objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
   let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
   let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
   let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
   let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
 
   // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
   let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
}

properties.name: Properties
properties.summary: PickerProperties 对象的属性将传递给数据处理程序。
properties.description: 返回 PickerProperties 对象，以指定数据处理程序组件的自定义属性。只读
properties.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码设置选取器对话框的各种属性并检索结果。
function test()
{
   let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
   objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
   objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
   let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
   let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
   
   // Show the Picker Dialog with no existing result.
   let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true)
}

properties.name: Title
properties.description: 设置或返回在选取器对话框中显示的选取器对话框的标题。可读/写
properties.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码设置选取器对话框的属性，然后显示选取器对话框。
function test()
{
   // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
   let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
   objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
   objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
   let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
   let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
   let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
   let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
 
   // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
   let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
}

functions.name: CreatePickerResults
functions.summary: 可以将 PickerResult 添加到返回的对象中，并如同 PickerDialog 对象已存在的结果一样，将其指定为 Show 方法的第二个参数。
functions.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码设置选取器对话框的各种属性，并将已存在的 PickerResults 添加到结果中。
function test()
{
   let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
   objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
   objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
   let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
   let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
   let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
}

functions.name: Resolve
functions.description: 使用选取器对话框解析标记，并检索结果。
functions.examples:
示例代码复制
//使用选取器对话框对象解析实体。
function test()
{
   // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
   let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
   objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
   objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
   let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
   let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
   // Resolve the token by using Picker Dialog and get the results.
   let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Resolve("johndoe", false)
}

functions.name: Show
functions.description: 使用已指定的数据处理程序和给定的选项显示选取器对话框。
functions.examples:
示例代码复制
//下面的代码设置选取器对话框的属性，然后显示选取器对话框。
function test()
{
   // Configure the Picker Dialog properties.
   let objPickerDialog = Application.PickerDialog
   objPickerDialog.DataHandlerId = "{000CDF0A-0000-0000-C000-000000000046}"
   objPickerDialog.Title = "Sample Picker Dialog"
   let objPickerProperties = objPickerDialog.Properties
   let objPickerProperty = objPickerProperties.Add("SiteUrl", "http://my", Application.Enum.msoPickerFieldText)
   let objPickerExistingResults = objPickerDialog.CreatePickerResults()
   let objPickerExistingResult = objPickerExistingResults.Add("johndoe@contoso.com", "John Doe", "User")
 
   // Show the Picker Dialog and get the results.
   let objPickerResults = objPickerDialog.Show(true, objPickerExistingResult)
}

parameters.name: sMultiSelect
parameters.description: 指定选取器对话框用户界面是否提供多项选择功能。

parameters.name: ExistingResults
parameters.description: 包含选取器对话框用户界面内的现有 PickerResults。这些结果在选定的项控件中显示。
